title: MERCHANT_NETWORK defaults testnet silently on mainnet
description: If MERCHANT_NETWORK env var is absent, load_merchant_wallet() defaults to ZcashNetwork::Testnet (main.rs line 204). On a mainnet relay the relay then derives testnet Sapling addresses for all subscription invoices. Users who pay receive no scan confirmation (addresses belong to a different network); subscriptions are never activated. Startup only logs 'network=Testnet' — no error or guard prevents silent misconfiguration.
